channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rivers State Government Commends FRSC and NDLEA on Security Efforts, NDLEA Proposes Drug Screening in Schools and NYSC Camps
item.description: Rivers State Government don express strong appreciation to federal agencies like FRSC and NDLEA for di way dem dey work together to enhance security across di state. During courtesy visits by NDLEA St...

item.title: Kerala High Court asks Election Commission to decide within two months on plea against BJP's Guruvayur candidate over alleged communal campaign remarks
item.description: The Kerala High Court on Friday directed the Election Commission of India to consider and decide within two months a complaint filed against Bharatiya Janata Party candidate B Gopalakrishnan for alleg...

item.title: G7 seeks clarity from US on strategy for Iran conflict amid rising tensions
item.description: At a meeting in France, G7 foreign ministers pressed US Secretary of State Marco Rubio to clarify Washington’s plans in the ongoing war against Iran, nearly a month after hostilities began. The talks,...

item.title: Fiancé of gospel singer Irene Robert recounts her final moments and clarifies cause of death
item.description: Brian Mutenye Waboto, popularly known as Don BMW, the fiancé of late gospel singer Irene Robert, has spoken publicly for the first time after her sudden death on March 20, 2026. Don, who also serves a...

item.title: Rogers and Freedom Mobile Confirm Recent Data Breaches Affecting Customer Information
item.description: Quebecor Inc.'s Freedom Mobile and Rogers Communications Inc., along with its subsidiary Fido, have both reported recent data breaches affecting customer information, though no financial data was comp...

item.title: UN Reports Massive Displacement of Children in Lebanon amid Intensified Israeli Strikes
item.description: According to the United Nations, more than 370,000 children in Lebanon have been forced from their homes within three weeks due to Israel’s expanding military operations. The escalation comes as Israe...

item.title: Leading with People, Purpose and Meaningful Impact
item.description: The article by Azim Jamal explores how true leadership begins from within and focuses on three enduring pillars: people, purpose, and impact. It argues that many leaders become too caught up in delive...

item.title: The Rise of East African Boxing and Its Regional Impact
item.description: Over the past few years, boxing in East Africa has been quietly but steadily transforming into one of the region’s strongest and most exciting sports. Tanzania has seen a surge in recognition after th...

item.title: Elon Musk Participated in Phone Call Between PM Modi and President Trump on West Asia Crisis, Says NYT Report
item.description: According to a report by The New York Times, billionaire Elon Musk joined a phone call between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump on Tuesday, March 24, 2026. The leaders discus...

item.title: Ekurhuleni Former EPWP Workers Seek Jobs and Outstanding Compensation
item.description: Around 200 former municipal workers in Ekurhuleni staged a march from Golden Walk to the mayor's office in Germiston on Wednesday, coinciding with Mayor Nkosindiphile Xhakaza's State of the City addre...

item.title: DR Congo aims to qualify for World Cup after 50 years
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo (DR Congo) dey prepared to end a long 50-year wait and make a return to the World Cup finals. The last time dem compete for the finals, the country was known as Zaire ...

item.title: ALAF invests in employees’ health through Kilimanjaro Marathon participation
item.description: ALAF Limited, one of Tanzania’s leading steel product manufacturers, has shown strong commitment to the health and wellbeing of its employees by actively participating in the Kilimanjaro Premium Lager...

item.title: Climate change causing coastal erosion and disturbing graves in Tanzania islands and shores
item.description: In Tanzania coastal areas and islands like Panza, Madauni, Ufunguni in Pemba and Pangani in Tanga Region, climate change is bringing serious problems. Rising sea levels and strong waves are eroding th...

item.title: US-Israeli Strikes Hit Iran’s Nuclear and Industrial Sites Amid Tensions
item.description: Tensions in the Gulf region escalated as US and Israeli air strikes targeted Iran’s uranium processing facility in Arak and the heavy water reactor in Khondab, raising concerns from the International ...

item.title: Exploring Gothic Influences in Lady Gaga’s Mayhem Ball and Contemporary Celebrity Culture
item.description: Lady Gaga’s 2025 Mayhem Ball tour has drawn attention for its striking use of gothic aesthetics, merging macabre theatricality with contemporary pop performance. Skeletons, doppelgängers, zombies, can...

item.title: Jeepney driver makes heartfelt plea that captures public attention
item.description: A jeepney driver’s heartfelt plea recently went viral online, catching the attention of many Filipinos across social media platforms. The driver, who has been struggling with the rising cost of daily ...

item.title: Stan Mathabatha reflects on leadership and unity as he steps down as Limpopo ANC chair
item.description: Outgoing Limpopo ANC chairperson Stan Mathabatha has downplayed tension between himself and provincial secretary Reuben Madadzhe, saying their differences were political rather than personal. Speaking...

item.title: NTSA Halts Instant Traffic Fines for Public Education and Legal Review
item.description: The National Transport and Safety Authority (NTSA) has suspended the instant traffic fines system just weeks after it was rolled out across major roads, especially in Nairobi. The system, which starte...

item.title: Pakistan and China pledge continued cooperation for regional peace and diplomatic engagement
item.description: Pakistan and China have once more emphasised their shared dedication to regional peace, stability, and diplomatic engagement, particularly in light of renewed tensions in the Middle East. In a telepho...

item.title: Akira Morishita showcases versatile talent in ‘Your Face Sounds Familiar’ transformations
item.description: Kapamilya star Akira Morishita, a member of BGYO, has consistently wowed audiences with his admirable performances on the ABS-CBN variety show ‘Your Face Sounds Familiar.’ Known for his charm, stage p...
